prompt: Logo design on pure black background. HORIZONTAL LAYOUT, reading left to right. Two elements side by side with precise spacing: ELEMENT 1 (LEFT SIDE): A rectangular frame/box with a thick yellow (#FAFA00) border (approximately 6px thick stroke). The rectangle is slightly taller than wide, portrait-oriented. Inside the yellow rectangular frame, on solid black fill, the letters 'MM' in bold white uppercase, stacked — 'M' on top, 'M' on bottom — perfectly centered within the frame. The typeface is a bold, blocky, geometric condensed sans-serif like Impact or Helvetica Neue Black Condensed — tall narrow letterforms, thick vertical strokes, sharp 90-degree corners, minimal counter space. The MM fills about 75% of the interior of the yellow frame. ELEMENT 2 (RIGHT SIDE): Immediately to the right of the yellow frame, with a small gap, the word 'AGENCY.' (with a period/dot at the end) in the EXACT SAME typeface and weight as the MM, but in white color. The text 'AGENCY.' is vertically centered relative to the yellow frame. The period/dot at the end of AGENCY is a small yellow (#FAFA00) square, not a circle — this is a signature brand element. CRITICAL RULES: The yellow frame ONLY surrounds the MM, not the word AGENCY. The overall composition reads as [MM] AGENCY. from left to right. The yellow frame is a clean geometric rectangle with sharp corners, not rounded. Everything is flat design, no shadows, no gradients, no 3D effects. The typeface must be identical for both MM and AGENCY — same bold condensed geometric sans-serif throughout. Clean vector quality, razor sharp edges, perfectly aligned baselines.
